rationale: The cited work is discussed explicitly in the theory and general discussion sections, not only listed in a background citation string. The authors summarize its specific empirical pattern (stronger left-digit bias in stimulus-based than memory-based evaluation) and use it to evaluate competing mechanism accounts. They then position their own categorization account as qualifying what an attention-only interpretation can explain, so the citation has a meaningful conceptual role.
relation_description: The citing paper uses Sokolova et al. (2020) as key prior evidence on left-digit-bias processing and then argues that the pattern leaves room for a top-down categorization mechanism. In doing so, it qualifies and sharpens the mechanism-level interpretation connected to that prior work.
